description: An item-master classification record (Category/Segment). It uses a composite natural key (classType + classCode + classDesc) and carries segment/subSegment for the item taxonomy and spend reporting. Distinct from the requisition-level RequisitionCategory enum {Items, Spares, Services, ProductDesign}: this is the finer item classification an Item references and analytics cut spend by. Maintainable individually or by bulk import (natural-key upsert by the composite key, master label 'segments').

fields.name: classType
fields.label: Class Type
fields.validation: non-blank; part 1 of the composite natural key (classType + classCode + classDesc); unique together
fields.purpose: The top tier of the item classification (e.g. Raw Material, Packing Material, Spare); the first key part that, with classCode and classDesc, uniquely identifies a category and groups items for spend cuts.

fields.name: classCode
fields.label: Class Code
fields.validation: non-blank; part 2 of the composite natural key; the short code used inside item-code generation
fields.purpose: The short code embedded in the configurable item-code pattern (DEP/SG/SSG/run); the second key part that makes the category machine-referenceable from an item code.

fields.name: classDesc
fields.label: Class Description
fields.validation: non-blank; part 3 of the composite natural key; the human-readable description shown in dropdowns
fields.purpose: The readable description completing the composite key; the label shown when an item or requisition line picks a category, and the dimension spend reports group by.

fields.name: segment
fields.label: Segment
fields.validation: non-blank when set; the segment tier of the taxonomy an item rolls up to
fields.purpose: The segment an item belongs to; the mid-level taxonomy node spend analytics aggregate to (spend by category/segment) and the field an item references for classification.

fields.name: subSegment
fields.label: Sub-Segment
fields.validation: non-blank when set; the finest taxonomy tier under segment
fields.purpose: The finest classification tier under segment; lets spend cuts and item search drill from segment to sub-segment for tail-spend and concentration analysis.

fields.name: requisitionCategory
fields.label: Requisition Category
fields.validation: one of {Items, Spares, Services, ProductDesign}; maps this item category to the requisition-level branch driver
fields.purpose: Maps the fine item classification to the requisition-level RequisitionCategory that drives field config and receipt routing (materials->QC->GRN vs spares->Engineering vs services->milestone), so an item's category implies its requisition behaviour.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: INACTIVE not selectable for new item classification; existing items retain their category
fields.purpose: Lets an admin retire a category from new classification without altering items already classified under it.

invariants: A13 audit + SSE on every committed master change
composite natural key (classType + classCode + classDesc) is unique; the bulk-import upsert key
requisitionCategory drawn from the RequisitionCategory controlled vocabulary
